holdings.infoBox: DTH is an equity ETF with a total of 560 individual holdings. The top holdings are HSBC Holdings stock at 3.13%, Nestlé at 2.30%, Intesa Sanpaolo at 2.20%, Shell at 2.13%, and BHP Group at 2.09%.

overview.description: The WisdomTree International High Dividend Fund (DTH) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high dividend yield equity. The fund tracks a dividend-weighted index of developed-market stocks, excluding the US and Canada, ranked in the top 30% by dividend yield of the WisdomTree DEFA Index. DTH was launched on Jun 16, 2006 and is issued by WisdomTree.
